subcodes.first_line: This is a remembrance from the Remembered One to him who hath remembered his Lord and was among those who turned unto Him, and who hath forsaken his homeland in longing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا ذکر من لدی المذکور الی من ذکر ربه و کان من المقبلین و هاجر من دیاره شوقا
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @personal instructions
